def: End-to-End Encryption: A system of communication where only the communicating users can read the messages. In our message stream, messages are encrypted using XOR with a pre-shared secret key before saving to the DB.
An interactive, adaptive navigation dock at the bottom of the Company Portal that expands and updates based on active modules and user actions.
Minimum Viable Product: A version of a product with just enough features to be usable by early customers who can then provide feedback for future product development.
